name: Slow Burst Crystal
description: This weapon has an image of a snail worked into its hilt or grip, and it feels cold to the touch. A chill aura numbs this weapon's victim when you strike true. Whenever you score a critical hit with this weapon, the target is slowed (as the slow spell) for 3 rounds (Will DC 14 negates). This effect activates even if the creature struck is not normally subject to extra damage from critical hits.
unidentifiedDesc: A snail-adorned cold weapon augmentation crystal.
